title: Artemis II live: Watch as Artemis astronauts travel further from Earth than any humans before
description: The four astronauts beat a previous record of 248,655 miles set in 1970, as they travel on a looping path around the far side of the Moon.
content:
Artemis II crew challenges next generation 'to make sure this record is not long-lived'

title: EFL roundup: Lincoln promoted to Championship with win at Reading
description: After 65 years away from the second tier and nine years after escaping the National League, Lincoln will be in the Championship next season
content:

title: Savannah Guthrie fights back tears hosting first Today show since mother’s disappearance
description: The presenter did not mention her mother Nancy Guthrie who has not been seen since she disappeared on Feb 1
content:
Savannah Guthrie fought back tears as she returned to NBC’s Today show for the first time since her mother’s disappearance.

title: Premier League cries foul over proposed AI copyright reforms
description: A freedom of information request by The Times has revealed for the first time the extent of the sporting industry’s fears over plans to attract AI firms to the UK
content:
The Premier League has criticised ministers over their proposed reforms to copyright law, The Times can reveal.

title: For the First Time, Ukraine Outguns Russia in Long-Range Drone Attacks
description: Ukraine launched more attack drones than Russia in March for the first time, signaling a shift in the aerial war.
content:
In March, Ukraine launched more attack drones than Russia for the first time since the beginning of Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022.
